$description: Motion tokens for the Carbon Design System — durations and easing curves

01.$description: Micro-interactions such as button and toggle. Instant response to user action.

02.$description: Micro-interactions such as fade in. Subtle entrance or exit of small UI elements.

01.$description: Micro-interactions, small expansion, short distance movements. Default transition speed.

02.$description: Expansion, system communication, toast. Slightly longer interactions with more visual weight.

01.$description: Large expansion, important system notifications. Deliberate, prominent transitions.

02.$description: Background dimming, large hero transitions. Slow, immersive motion for maximum emphasis.

productive.$description: Standard easing for productive motion. Used for UI elements that move within the viewport.

expressive.$description: Standard easing for expressive motion. Used for elements with more prominent, fluid movement.

productive.$description: Entrance easing for productive motion. Used when elements enter the screen.

expressive.$description: Entrance easing for expressive motion. Used for prominent element entrances.

productive.$description: Exit easing for productive motion. Used when elements leave the screen.

expressive.$description: Exit easing for expressive motion. Used for prominent element exits.
